in-place (note: also patched in level files)

english: Spend 1 Hit Die on a 1 hour short rest?
Burn an incense to regain a 1st level spellslot? You have
french: Brûler un encens pour récupérer un slot lvl 1 ? Vous avez

english: Reinvigorated: Regain 1 use of a spent Hit Dice.
french: Revigoré : Récupère 1 usage de DV dépensé.

english: Resurgent: Regain 2 uses of spent Hit Dice.
french: Renaissant : Récupère 2 usages de Dés de Vie.

english: healing. You lose a level of exhaustion.
Energized: Get rid of 1 level of Exhaustion.
You didn't make it far last time. That's my bad.
french: T'es pas allé loin avant. C'est ma faute.

english: Ready for another round?\n\nIf you want a tip: prepare spells at the shrine, then heal yourself. And eat some apples. That should get you through the lichhouse gauntlet.
french: Prêt pour un autre round ?\n\nConseil : prépare des sorts à l'autel, puis soigne-toi. Et mange des pommes. Tu passeras le gantelet du lichhouse.

english: You didn't make it far last time. That's my bad.
french: T'es pas allé loin avant. C'est ma faute.

english: Spend 1 hour to recover. Gain (1d8) HP, remove 1 level of exhaustion, and restore 1 spell slot.
french: 1h pour récup. Gagne (1d8) PV, retire 1 niv. d'épuisement, restaure 1 sort.

english: Spend 1 hour to recover. Gain (1d8) HP, remove 1 level of exhaustion, and restore 1 spell slot. After resting, all dice checks are unlocked.
french: Profite d'1h pour récupérer. Gagne (1d8) PV, retire 1 niv. d'épuisement, restaure 1 sort. Les jets se débloquent.

english: \nSpend 1 hour to recover. Gain (1d8) HP, remove 1 level of exhaustion, and restore 1 spell slot. After resting, all dice checks are unlocked.
french: \nProfite d'1h pour récupérer. Gagne (1d8) PV, retire 1 niv. d'épuisement, restaure 1 sort. Les jets se débloquent.
